ovality_tolerance.formula: limit_mm = selected allowed max_diameter_mm - selected allowed min_diameter_mm
ovality_tolerance.source_text: Workbook row Ovalitet/Epäpyöreys is calculated as selected max diameter minus selected min diameter. EN 10217-7 Punkt/kohta 8.8.4.5, D>406.4 independent ovality tolerance 2% not considered.
ovality_tolerance.note: The app follows the workbook displayed ovality value from the selected diameter tolerance range; it does not apply the separate D>406.4 2% ovality rule.
